title: WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION CURRY WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weatherization assistance including: -Heating Source Repair: May be able to service, repair, or replace broken furnaces, heating systems, or wood stoves, or provide a permanent heat source in homes without an existing source. -Insulation: Provides increased insulation in site-built and mobile homes. Eligible areas include floors, attics, and walls in site-built homes and underbelly blown-in insulation in mobile homes. -Weatherization: Helps households save as much as $200 a year on electric bills. Provides up-to-date information on how to save energy and free energy-saving products. 937 Chetco Avenue Suite D Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: 60% or below the median income for the State of Oregon Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 435-7750 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 435-7750 Weatherization Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Applications available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security cards for all household members, drivers license or state ID card for all adults in household, most recent utility bill, and proof of income Acceptable forms of proof of income: -TANF (4-page print-out obtained from DHS office) -Pay stubs (full 90 days are required or appointment will be rescheduled) -SSD or SSI award letter (for the current year) or tax form 1099 -Child support payment history printout -Payment printout for unemployment benefits -VA benefits (recent award letter) -For applicants claiming zero income, a DHS SNAP/food stamp printout will be required LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Furnaces Repair Services Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDNET HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING STABILIZATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION CURRY
